headline: US threatens fresh 12.5% tariffs on Switzerland over forced-labour finding
summary: Washington proposes new duties on ~60 economies including Switzerland citing insufficient action against forced labour; mooted 12.5% rate.

headline: Vaud tax-shield scandal: canton books CHF 202m in losses, new taxation errors found
summary: Vaud Council of State publishes audits estimating CHF 202m losses from mis-applied fiscal shield and reveals further errors.

headline: Swiss Post to cut ~60 IT jobs amid system reorientation
summary: State-owned Swiss Post confirms it will eliminate around sixty IT posts in Switzerland.

headline: Sommersession 2026: parliament debates expanded intelligence-service (NDB) powers
summary: Federal chambers debate how much surveillance authority the Federal Intelligence Service should have.

headline: 13th AHV pension financing back to deadlock in parliament
summary: Parliament remains deadlocked over how to fund the 13th annual old-age-pension instalment.

headline: Geneva and No-G7 coalition near a negotiated route for the 14 June march
summary: Negotiated right-bank route likely for the anti-G7 demo; over 1,000 police expected.

headline: Ukrainian drone strike hits energy sites near St Petersburg ahead of Putin's economic forum
summary: Drone strike targeted energy facilities near St Petersburg hours before SPIEF opened.

headline: US lawmakers question credentials of Trump's acting intelligence chief Bill Pulte
summary: Republicans and Democrats question the qualifications of Trump's intelligence appointee.

headline: Three British navy personnel killed in helicopter crash in Devon
summary: Three Royal Navy personnel died in a helicopter crash during a training exercise near Sourton, Devon.

headline: Israeli settler attacks drive Palestinian shepherds from Jordan Valley grazing lands
summary: Settler violence forces growing numbers of Palestinian herding communities to flee Jordan Valley villages.

headline: EU calls fresh US tariffs unjustified, invokes Turnberry accord, opts for dialogue
summary: Commission says it will analyse US probe findings and keep talking rather than retaliate.

headline: DRC Ebola outbreak spreads across borders with no approved vaccine for the strain
summary: Outbreak crosses national borders; DRC floats closed-doors World Cup warm-up after La Linea bans friendly.

headline: CBS ousts veteran anchor Scott Pelley amid pressure over Trump coverage
summary: CBS removes 60 Minutes anchor Scott Pelley after he criticised the network's editorial direction.

headline: CVE-2026-47065 (CVSS 9.8): deserialization filter bypass via java.lang.reflect.Proxy in an Apache project
summary: resolveProxyClass not overridden allows acceptMatchers filter bypass; unauthenticated RCE, patched.

headline: CVE-2026-35075 (CVSS 9.8): hard-coded firmware password in a DALI/building-automation gateway
summary: Unauthenticated attacker recovers default hard-coded password from firmware for full device access; VDE-2026-039.

headline: VDE-2026-039 cluster: stack overflows to root and file tampering in a DALI gateway
summary: Authenticated stack overflows (CVE-2026-35083/84/85) give root; ugw-* methods allow arbitrary file ops.

headline: CVE-2026-4035 (CVSS 9.1): MLflow AI Gateway leaks secrets via env-var resolution
summary: MLflow before 3.11.0 expands environment variables in AI Gateway secrets, enabling exfiltration; patched.

headline: CVE-2026-5241 (CVSS 8.0): RCE via LightGlue model-loading path in HuggingFace Transformers 5.2.0
summary: Attacker-controlled model repo runs arbitrary code when a LightGlue model is loaded; patched.

headline: CVE-2026-42321 (CVSS 8.4): stored XSS in GLPI IT-asset/helpdesk suite
summary: Technician can store a persistent XSS payload in GLPI 10.0.4-10.0.24; fixed in 10.0.25.

headline: CISA KEV adds Linux kernel cgroups (CVE-2022-0492), Android (CVE-2025-48595), Oracle WebLogic (CVE-2024-21182)
summary: Active-exploitation catalog additions this week including a known container-escape primitive.

headline: KVarN: variance-normalized KV-cache quantization for reasoning models
summary: Calibration-free KV-cache quantizer using Hadamard rotation and dual-axis variance normalization to curb decode-time error accumulation.

headline: Value-aware stochastic KV-cache eviction for reasoning models
summary: KV eviction protecting high-magnitude value states and adding stochasticity to avoid repetitive reasoning loops.

headline: How quantization changes interpretable SAE features in LLMs
summary: Frozen sparse-autoencoder study of whether interpretable features survive weight quantization.

headline: When model merging breaks MoE routing: training-free calibration
summary: Identifies routing breakdown when merging Mixture-of-Experts LLMs and proposes a training-free recalibration fix.

headline: Small RL controller guides adaptive sampling for LLM test-time scaling
summary: Lightweight RL-trained controller decides when to stop sampling to balance accuracy, latency and compute.

headline: Dynamic short convolutions improve Transformers
summary: Adds input-dependent short convolutions to query/key/value projections, boosting associative recall.
